steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0817.140751.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Fill in fraud control config: secondQueue
Fill in fraud control display name: ControlDisplaySecond
Verify that 'Control was update successfully' alert is appeared
Verify that all the data are changed in the rowControlOne
